## Change

Describe the behavior and why it belongs inside AGU's analysis-engine boundary.

## Verification

- [ ] Focused pytest
- [ ] Full pytest when shared behavior changed
- [ ] `python scripts/verify_harness.py`
- [ ] Local service curl hook when runtime behavior changed
- [ ] Public docs/config updated

## Compatibility and provenance

- [ ] v3 preprocessing unchanged, or training/tests updated together
- [ ] API/schema compatibility considered
- [ ] New dependency/model/data license and fallback documented
- [ ] No private video, output, checkpoint, or secret included
